test-method.name: verifyAddition
test-method.description: Verify the addition of two numbers

test-method.name: verifyDecimalCalculation
test-method.description: Verify the calculation of two decimal numbers

test-method.name: verifyDivision
test-method.description: Verify the devision of two numbers

test-method.name: verifyMultipleChainedOperations
test-method.description: Verify the BOSMAD calculation of three or more numbers

test-method.name: verifyMultiplication
test-method.description: Verify the multiplication of two numbers

test-method.name: verifySubtraction
test-method.description: Verify the Subtraction of two numbers
